title: Bernadette “Yaayuk” Alvanna-Stimpfle elected as Chair of the Alaska Native Language Preservation and Advisory Council
summary: BSNC shareholder and Nome resident Bernadette “Yaayuk” Alvanna-Stimpfle was recently elected as Chair of the Alaska Native Language Preservation and Advisory Council. The council advises Alaska’s governor and legislature on programs, policies and advocates for the survival and revitalization of Alas...
